name: Buttery Peas and Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 10 Ounces Frozen peas in butter sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook peas according to the package directions. Pour into a serving bowl and cover with plastic wrap.
2. Set aside.
3. In a skillet, simmer water and zucchini over medium heat until water is evaporated and zucchini is tender.
4. Stir in peas and pimiento.
